branding.tone: Modern, Premium, Simple, Trustworthy, Consumer-friendly (Apple/Dyson inspired)

headings.usage: All section titles, hero headlines, and feature names. Use tight tracking (-0.02em) for larger sizes.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, buttons, navigation, data labels.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1D1D1F] text-white hover:bg-[#333333] transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium text-sm tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1D1D1F] border border-[#E5E5E5] hover:border-[#1D1D1F] transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium text-sm tracking-wide
buttons.accent: bg-[#B45309] text-white hover:bg-[#9A4507] transition-all duration-300 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium text-sm tracking-wide

cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.solid: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.search_hero: h-16 pl-6 pr-16 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#E5E5E5] focus:border-[#B45309] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#B45309] text-lg rounded-2xl shadow-sm w-full transition-all duration-300

motion.fade_up: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }}
motion.stagger: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building BioLens, a premium materials transparency tool. The aesthetic must be 'Apple/Dyson'—clean, sophisticated, gallery-like. NO e-commerce vibes. Focus on education and clarity.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import Playfair Display (400, 600, 700) and Inter (300, 400, 500, 600) from Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
layout_rules: Use massive whitespace. Sections should have py-24 or py-32.
Never center long text. Center headings only if the layout is symmetrical.
Use the 'Bento' grid for the 'Explore Materials' page.
The 'Petro-risk' level should use a color-coded badge or progress bar (Green = Low, Red = High).
components: Navbar: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl), simple logo on left, links on right, no big CTA.
Hero: Centered search bar (large, elegant), tagline in Playfair Display, subtle abstract background.
Results Page: Split layout or centered card focus. Show the 'Risk Level' prominently.
How It Works: 4-step horizontal process with icons/illustrations.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
